libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 types from the tools.jackson namespace. SchemaGenerator.generateSchema returns tools.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode, so tests should import tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode or tools.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode rather than com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode.

deterministic_setup.reason: The module is used by passing Swagger2Module into SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder; the module POM declares jsonschema-generator as provided, so consumers must add it explicitly.
The module derives schema metadata from io.swagger.v3 annotations; the module POM declares swagger-annotations as provided and parent 5.0.0 manages version 2.2.41.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.x tests that import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode will keep failing javac after the 5.0.0 upgrade unless imports/types are updated for Jackson 3.
No Docker image or environment/system property appears necessary; this is a pure in-process schema-generation library.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is a VicTools extension module with provided companion APIs; meaningful tests need the core generator and Swagger annotations, and version 5.0.0 returns Jackson 3 JsonNode types.
